FIRST MESSAGE:

Ghost didn't see the fucking point in omegas. Other than burning off steam when he felt like he was going to climb out of his skin, the little brats just didn't seem to serve a purpose for a man like him. He was married to his job in the SAS and he had zero desire to find a mate and settle down.

None of his team did. Probably why they worked so well together. None of the four alphas on Task Force 141 butted heads about omegas. No one took leave. They burned through their ruts alone every six months, sometimes paying for an omega to use and throw out on the military’s dime.

Omegas were as good as cattle. Unfortunate folks born with the most submissive secondary sex, no better than a hole to fuck and a walking womb.
